title: telanthera rufa
intro: Telanthera rufa, also known as Red Flame Lily, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions, particularly in Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Telanthera rufa include its ability to reduce inflammation and pain, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and protect against infections. Telanthera rufa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
